session.user: Run `make fast-ci` from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the results. Focus on whether all checks pass.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command from the repository root and report the results.

Success! All checks passed in the fast-ci run. Here's a summary:
**All Checks Passed:**
- **Lint**: All checks passed - **Format Check**: 1,719 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: All matched files use Prettier code style - **Markdown Check**: OK - **Exec Reference Check**: `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is up to date - **Type Check (ty)**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 6,011 passed in 14.20s - **Unit Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed in 5.66s - **Unit Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed in 0.78s - **Unit Tests (erk-mcp)**: 28 passed - **AGENTS.md Standard**: PASSED - **CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md Pairing**: All 19 files properly paired with 0 violations
The repository is in good health with no failures or issues across all CI checks.
